tlscheck.x509.cn.description: The commonName in the subject of the certificate.

tlscheck.x509.issuer.description: The entity that issued the certificate.

tlscheck.x509.san.description: The Subject Alternative Name of the certificate.

description: This receiver emits metrics about x.509 certificates.

tlscheck.time_left.description: Time in seconds until certificate expiry, as specified by `NotAfter` field in the x.509 certificate. Negative values represent time in seconds since expiration.

name: tlscheckreceiver
